codeReview.summary: HMAC-SHA256 signed session tokens properly implemented. Token contains userId, username, issuedAt, expiresAt. Configurable expiry via TOKEN_EXPIRY_HOURS env var (default 24h). Token blacklist for logout invalidation. Timing-safe signature comparison.

summary: auth-token-generation implementation follows best practices. Proper signing, expiry, and invalidation mechanisms. Configurable via environment variables.
